about.title: Here's a bit about me
about.description: I am Muzaki Abdullah Irsyad, a fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering from STT Terpadu Nurul Fikri with a GPA of 3.86/4.00. I have a strong passion for software development and IT support, and have earned certifications in Microsoft Office, cloud computing, graphic design, and video editing. I have gained practical experience through the Kampus Merdeka program in Web Development and Codeless Data Science, and have worked as a Junior IT Support and Trainee Engineer.
